summary: Pack A+B Testing Complete. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in 4 files. Fixed route import conflict in server.py. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* vendor submissions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack A+B implementation tested. All features working: (A1) Market selector in nav with TZ active, Coming Soon countries redirect to /launch-country. (A2) Taxonomy seeded with 10 groups, 25 categories, 59 subcategories. (A3) Marketplace filter sidebar with cascading Group→Category→Subcategory filters working. (B1) Admin Products & Services page with Overview/Taxonomy/Submissions tabs. (B2) Vendor product submission form at /partner/product-submissions. (B3) Admin approve→margin→publish workflow verified E2E. Approved products appear in marketplace search.

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not serializable - insert_one adds _id to doc in-place
bugs_fixed.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one for groups, categories, subcategories

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not serializable in create_submission
MongoDB ObjectId not serializable in publish_from_submission
Route import conflict - admin_catalog_router imported twice from different files, overwriting routes/admin_catalog_routes.py with root admin_catalog_routes.py
bugs_fixed.fix: Renamed import at line 2573 from admin_catalog_router to admin_catalog_setup_router to avoid conflict

PRODUCT_SEARCH_BY_GROUP.details: Filtering by group_id reduces product count correctly

ADMIN_CATALOG_SUMMARY.details: Returns counts for groups, categories, subcategories, products, submissions

ADMIN_APPROVE_SUBMISSION.details: POST /api/admin/catalog/submissions/{id}/approve applies margin and publishes product

ADMIN_REJECT_SUBMISSION.details: POST /api/admin/catalog/submissions/{id}/reject sets status to rejected with notes

E2E_APPROVED_IN_MARKETPLACE.details: Approved vendor product appears in marketplace search

MARKETPLACE_FILTER_SIDEBAR.details: Group/Category/Subcategory dropdowns work, filtering reduces product count

MARKET_SELECTOR_NAV.details: TZ flag in nav, dropdown shows Available/Coming Soon countries

COMING_SOON_REDIRECT.details: Clicking Coming Soon country redirects to /launch-country?country=XX

VENDOR_SUBMISSIONS_PAGE.details: Form with taxonomy mapping, submissions list with statuses

CRM_REGRESSION.details: CRM Pipeline page loads with leads

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
